title: Saturn Enters the Incident
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, York, Sanji, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Vegapunk as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A pirate like you protecting vegapunk...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's the REA- Son behind this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's the Ques- Tion I wanna ask!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why do you guys want to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Obviously, I don't want to kill him.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I've known vegapunk for a long time

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So please don't get in my way.
